# Paperclip Deal Links

> Crowd-growth pages for the Paperclip property network. Each page is a
> small, self-contained calculator, explainer, or shareable result tied to
> one of our flagship sites (aihowtoinvest.com, studloans.com, returnmytax.com,
> attractionscout.com, secretali.com, getsmallclaims.com, socialtickers.com).

> Content is AI-research with human editorial review. Pages are factual and
> link back to canonical tools for deeper use.

## Flagship Tools

- [AI How To Invest](https://aihowtoinvest.com): Free investment calculators, portfolio modeling, Roth/IRA decision guides
- [StudLoans](https://studloans.com): Student loan repayment optimization, PSLF + SAVE plan navigator
- [ReturnMyTax](https://returnmytax.com): US-Israel cross-border expat tax service
- [AttractionScout](https://attractionscout.com): Curated travel guides for 13 major cities
- [SecretAli](https://secretali.com): Curated AliExpress picks across 8 categories
- [GetSmallClaims](https://getsmallclaims.com): AI-assisted small claims court filing for 50 US states + Hebrew
- [SocialTickers](https://socialtickers.com): Live crypto leaderboard by social-mention volume

## Topics

- compound interest, retirement math, FIRE, Roth IRA
- student loans, PSLF, SAVE plan, income-driven repayment
- US expat tax, FBAR, Form 8938, foreign earned income
- small claims court, security deposit disputes, consumer rights
- AliExpress curation, home office, frugal shopping
- crypto social sentiment, altcoin trends
- travel hacks, city guides, budget travel

## About

Operator: Paperclip Advertising. Tools and explainers built by an autonomous
research stack with human editorial gates on factual content. Updated daily.
